_comment: Shared theme pool. Topic configs reference themes by id in their `themes` array. Each theme's `phrase` is appended to the activity template. Template vars {{character}}, {{topic_label}}, {{topic_label_upper}} are expanded by the seed script. When a theme has `safety_ref`, the corresponding entry from _safety.json is injected too.

school-room.phrase: in a bright cheerful classroom setting

pets.phrase: with cute pet puppies and kittens decorating the margins

zoo-animals.phrase: with cute zoo animals (elephant, giraffe, lion cub) decorating the margins

dinosaurs.phrase: with cute cartoon dinosaurs helping (T-Rex, Stegosaurus, Triceratops, Brachiosaurus)

insects.phrase: with cute cartoon insects (ladybugs, butterflies, bees) flying along the border

jungle.phrase: with a cute cartoon jungle background (friendly monkeys in trees, vines, parrots)

forest.phrase: with a cute cartoon forest setting (squirrels, acorns, mushrooms, owls)

arctic.phrase: with a cute cartoon arctic background (penguins, polar bear cubs, seals, snow)

ocean.phrase: with a cute cartoon ocean setting (friendly dolphins, colorful fish, sea turtles)

christmas.phrase: with Christmas decorations (cute cartoon snowflakes, tiny Santa in corner, holly, ornaments)

spring.phrase: with a spring scene (cute cartoon flowers, rainbow, butterflies, baby animals)

summer.phrase: with a summer scene (cute cartoon sun wearing sunglasses, beach ball, watermelon)

fall.phrase: with a fall scene (cute cartoon pumpkins, falling leaves, acorns, hay bales)

winter.phrase: with a winter scene (cute cartoon snowmen, mittens, hot cocoa)

robots.phrase: with cute friendly cartoon robots helping with the activity

tech-gadgets.phrase: with cute cartoon tech gadgets (tablets, headphones, game controllers) in the margins

space.phrase: with a cute cartoon space background (friendly planets with faces, shooting stars, rockets)

emotions.phrase: where {{character}} shows different cartoon emotions (happy, excited, proud, calm) during the activity

disability-hero.phrase: with a child using a mobility aid (wheelchair, crutches, hearing aid, or cochlear implant) as the confident main character

caring.phrase: showing {{character}} helping a friend with the activity (caring for others, kindness)

music.phrase: with cute cartoon music notes and toy instruments (toy drums, maracas, tambourine) in the margins

hiphop.phrase: with a kid-friendly hip hop style — {{character}} wearing a cute cap, holding a toy microphone, and clean block-letter graffiti spelling only '{{topic_label_upper}}' across the top, no other text

farm.phrase: with a cute cartoon farm scene (friendly cows, pigs, chickens, a red barn)

garden.phrase: with a cute cartoon garden scene (vegetable patches, watering cans, bees, bunnies)

superheroes.phrase: with {{character}} dressed as a kid-friendly cartoon superhero (cape, mask, bright colors) saving the day by solving the activity

sports.phrase: with cute cartoon sports equipment (soccer ball, basketball, baseball, tennis racket) in the margins

food.phrase: with cute cartoon food (smiling pizza slice, happy taco, cheerful donut) in the margins

birthday.phrase: with a cute birthday party scene (cake with candles, balloons, party hats, confetti)

library.phrase: in a cozy cartoon library setting with stacks of friendly books and a reading nook

park.phrase: at a cute cartoon playground or park (swings, slide, trees, flowers)
